mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE username=#{username} and password=#{password}
SELECT id FROM users WHERE username=#{username}
SELECT phone FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT password FROM users WHERE username=#{username}
SELECT password FROM users WHERE phone=#{phone} and status != 6 and tenant_id=#{tenantId}
SELECT password FROM users WHERE id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = 1, frozen_until = NULL WHERE id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND frozen_until <= NOW()
mapper.select: select count(id) - 1 from users where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, status, created_at, updated_at, frozen_until, tenant_id FROM users WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
